mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confirm_flag = 0) AS unconfirmed FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confirm_flag = 0) AS unconfirmed FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY alarm_target_type_flag ORDER BY alarm_target_type_flag
SELECT alarm_type_flag::text AS key, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY alarm_type_flag ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT id, CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, entity_id AS source_id, point_id, alarm_type_flag AS alarm_type_flag, confirm_flag, create_time, COALESCE(alarm_ext ->> 'content', '') AS message FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT date_trunc('hour', create_time) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

SELECT id, CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, entity_id AS source_id, point_id, alarm_type_flag AS alarm_type_flag, confirm_flag, create_time, COALESCE(alarm_ext ->> 'content', '') AS message FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND alarm_target_type_flag = 1 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 0 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 2 AND alarm_type_flag = #{alarmTypeFlag} AND confirm_flag = #{confirmFlag} AND create_time >= #{from} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confirm_flag = 0) AS unconfirmed FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY alarm_target_type_flag ORDER BY alarm_target_type_flag
mapper.update: UPDATE dc3_entity_alarm SET confirm_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 1 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 0 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 2
UPDATE dc3_entity_alarm SET confirm_flag = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 1 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 0 AND alarm_target_type_flag = 2
mapper.select: SELECT d.day ::text AS date, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN a.alarm_target_type_flag IN (0, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS device_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alarm_target_type_flag = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS driver_count FROM (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', #{from})::date, CURRENT_DATE, '1 day') ::date AS day) d LEFT JOIN dc3_entity_alarm a ON date_trunc('day', a.create_time)::date = d.day AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC

SELECT CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, entity_id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY alarm_target_type_flag, entity_id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT alarm_ext ->> 'type' AS key, COUNT (*) AS count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} AND alarm_ext ->> 'type' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY key ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, entity_id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY alarm_target_type_flag, entity_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount} ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, entity_id AS source_id, alarm_type_flag AS alarm_type_flag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY alarm_target_type_flag, entity_id, alarm_type_flag HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount} ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH ev AS (SELECT CASE alarm_target_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'point' WHEN 1 THEN 'device' ELSE 'driver' END AS source, entity_id AS source_id, alarm_type_flag AS alarm_type_flag, create_time, id FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from}) SELECT e1.source AS a_source, e1.source_id AS a_source_id, e1.alarm_type_flag AS a_event_type, e2.source AS b_source, e2.source_id AS b_source_id, e2.alarm_type_flag AS b_event_type, COUNT(*) AS co_count FROM ev e1 JOIN ev e2 ON abs(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e1.create_time - e2.create_time))) <= #{windowSec} AND (e1.source <> e2.source OR e1.source_id <> e2.source_id) AND (e1.source, e1.source_id, e1.alarm_type_flag) < (e2.source, e2.source_id, e2.alarm_type_flag) GROUP BY e1.source, e1.source_id, e1.alarm_type_flag, e2.source, e2.source_id, e2.alarm_type_flag ORDER BY co_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT d.profile_id AS profile_id, ea.device_id AS device_id, COUNT(*) AS alarm_count FROM dc3_entity_alarm ea JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_device d ON d.id = ea.device_id AND d.tenant_id = ea.tenant_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE ea.deleted = 0 AND ea.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ea.alarm_target_type_flag IN (0, 1) AND ea.create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY d.profile_id, ea.device_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age < INTERVAL '1 hour' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS under_1h, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age >= INTERVAL '1 hour' AND age < INTERVAL '6 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS h1_to_6, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age >= INTERVAL '6 hours' AND age < INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS h6_to_24, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age >= INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS over_24h, COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT NOW() - create_time AS age FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND confirm_flag = 0) ages

SELECT to_char(DATE(create_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (operate_time - create_time)) * 1000) AS p50_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (operate_time - create_time)) * 1000) AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS confirmed_count FROM dc3_entity_alarm WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND confirm_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT d.service_name AS service_name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) AS driver_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.enable_flag = 1 THEN d.id END) AS enabled_count, COUNT(DISTINCT dev.id) AS device_count FROM dc3_manager.dc3_driver d LEFT JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_device dev ON dev.driver_id = d.id AND dev.tenant_id = d.tenant_id AND dev.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY d.service_name ORDER BY device_count DESC, driver_count DESC

SELECT kind, id AS entity_id, operate_time FROM (SELECT 'driver'::text AS kind, id, operate_time, create_time FROM dc3_manager.dc3_driver WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND operate_time > create_time AND operate_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT 'device'::text, id, operate_time, create_time FROM dc3_manager.dc3_device WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND operate_time > create_time AND operate_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT 'profile'::text, id, operate_time, create_time FROM dc3_manager.dc3_profile WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND operate_time > create_time AND operate_time >= #{from}) u ORDER BY operate_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
